signals.headline: Solana Alpenglow Upgrade Passes Governance Vote with 98
signals.raw:
Solana Alpenglow Upgrade Passes Governance Vote with 98.27% Approval | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The Alpenglow consensus upgrade, reducing transaction finality to 100-150 milliseconds, was confirmed via a governance vote on April 14, 2026, boosting network performance expectations amid record 167 million monthly token holders and 148 million daily non-vote transactions.[4][6]

signals.headline: Military analysts note that if talks fail again, options under consideration include resuming limited strikes, full-scal
signals.raw:
Military analysts note that if talks fail again, options under consideration include resuming limited strikes, full-scale bombing campaigns, and pressuring allies for prolonged military escorts through the Strait of Hormuz[2].

This development would likely move prediction markets toward shorter-term diplomatic scenarios while maintaining elevated volatility given the fragile nature of negotiation

signals.headline: The imminent restart of talks represents a concrete shift from the collapsed Islamabad negotiations and signals continue
signals.raw: The imminent restart of talks represents a concrete shift from the collapsed Islamabad negotiations and signals continued diplomatic engagement rather than immediate military escalation[1].

signals.headline: However, significant uncertainty remains: the ceasefire is described as entering its final week[2], Trump maintains his
signals.raw: However, significant uncertainty remains: the ceasefire is described as entering its final week[2], Trump maintains his red line that "Iran will not have a nuclear weapon"[2], and deep trust deficits persist on both sides[2].
